changes.before: Whatever answer remained no longer lived in sacks and storehouses. It hung in what came after.
changes.after: The answer was now in what came after.

changes.before: No neat theorem. Nothing neat remained in it. A drag in the air.
changes.after: Only a drag in the air remained.

changes.before: No gentling in it. No pity either. Direction.
changes.after: It was only direction.

changes.before: Not comfort. Weight.
changes.after: Weight.

changes.before: Silence. Not absence. Him thinking in it.
changes.after: Silence, with him thinking in it.

changes.before: Not won't. Could not.
changes.after: Could not.

changes.before: Not surprise. The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.
changes.after: Recognition. The shape had already been there in the road, in the unfinished logic of the plague.

changes.before: Below her, the fires worked district by district.
changes.after: Below her, separate fire lines burned district by district.

changes.before: Stratholme had changed the air above itself.
changes.after: Smoke, ash, and residue had changed the air above Stratholme.

changes.before: The sight of them pulled her eye south again, then inward, then backward years in one sick motion.
changes.after: She followed them south again, then inward, then backward years in one sick motion.

changes.before: The image would not let go.
changes.after: She kept seeing it.

changes.before: It slid under every other memory and found the older ones waiting beneath it.
changes.after: She followed it past every other memory to the older ones beneath it.

changes.before: Her body caught the residue again, that wrong aftertaste beneath smoke, and the thought turned without asking permission.
changes.after: Her body caught the residue again, that wrong aftertaste beneath smoke, and she turned back to the thought before she could stop herself.

changes.before: Yet the city had still answered.
changes.after: Yet bodies across the city had still answered.

changes.before: The city below offered the argument against that faith in separate fires.
changes.after: The separate fires below were the argument against that faith.

changes.before: The stair waited where it had waited all day, cut into the inner wall, worn shallow at the center by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.
changes.after: The stair was where it had been all day, cut into the inner wall, worn shallow at the center by generations of watch-boots and now streaked with soot.

changes.before: The last word sat there and offended her with its thinness.
changes.after: The last word looked thin on the page.

changes.before: Practicality took the rider from them.
changes.after: Cyndia turned to the camp work, and the rider went with her.

changes.before: North took everything else.
changes.after: North sat in the dispatch tube, in her notebook, in the salt wind ahead.

changes.before: By the time full dark took the road, it no longer needed saying.
changes.after: Full dark took the road.

changes.before: North took everything else.
changes.after: North sat in the dispatch tube, in her notebook, in the salt wind ahead.

changes.before: North took everything else.
changes.after: North sat in the dispatch tube, in her notebook, in the salt wind ahead.
